sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18372" key="a)filostorgi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀφῐλο-στοργία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n18372.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">absence of natural affection,</tr_> implied in punning phrase of Timagenes, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡ πρὸς τὰ ἔκγονα φιλοστοργία </foreign>(<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἔκγον᾽ ἀ.</etym>) <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.634f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
